name: Calculateur Calories Exercice
desc: Calculez Calories = MET × Weight (kg) × Time (h). Exemple: Running (MET 9.8), 70 kg, 45 min = Calories burned ≈ 514 kcal. Calculateur gratuit et précis, sans inscription.

example_label: Calculezte calories ejercicio with peso_kg 70, duracion_min 30, met 8.
formula_display: Calculate calories ejercicio based on input values.
steps: Enter input values: peso_kg: 70, duracion_min: 30, met: 8
Calculezte and display the calories result

mistakes: Confusing unit options when entering values
Entering zero or negative values where positive required
Using incorrect input values outside recommended range
